ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state (e.g., NY, FL, AL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_state" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state represented by the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id", "state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_terms" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Term number of the representative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id", "term")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_committees" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the representative is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id", "committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_chairs" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative who is the chair of the committee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the chair's term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the chair's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id", "representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_categories" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the bill (e.g., energy, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id", "category")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_sponsors" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative sponsoring the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id", "representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_cosponsors" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative cosponsoring the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id", "representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amendment_sponsors" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amendment */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative sponsoring the amendment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id", "representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_outcomes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vote */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the vote (e.g., passed, failed, tie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id")
)
column_names: Abbreviation for the state (e.g., NY, FL, AL)
ID of the state represented by the representative
Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete)
ID of the committee the representative is part of
ID of the representative who is the chair of the committee
Start date of the chair's term
End date of the chair's term
Category of the bill (e.g., energy, finance)
ID of the representative sponsoring the bill
ID of the representative cosponsoring the bill
ID of the representative sponsoring the amendment
Outcome of the vote (e.g., passed, failed, tie)
